description: Probability threshold never breached 0.70 despite flux spike.
reason: Rapid onset CME without precursor solar wind compression.

description: Actual flux reached 12,000 pfu. Model P90 capped at 8,500.
reason: Known limitation: models smooth out the absolute highest statistical outliers.

description: Issued 12h alert. Event fizzled at 800 pfu (below 1000 pfu hazard).
reason: Favorable IMF Bz turn mitigated the incoming solar wind pressure.
